🛣️ Motor Vehicle Third-Party Premium

Mandatory motor insurance costs per country. What you must legally have to drive.

🛣️ 54 Countries💰 Free

Select your country to get started:

West Africa
🇳🇬Nigeria→🇬🇭Ghana→🇸🇳Senegal→🇨🇮Côte d'Ivoire→🇧🇯Benin→🇧🇫Burkina Faso→🇨🇻Cabo Verde→🇬🇲Gambia→🇬🇳Guinea→🇬🇼Guinea-Bissau→🇱🇷Liberia→🇲🇱Mali→🇲🇷Mauritania→🇳🇪Niger→🇸🇱Sierra Leone→🇹🇬Togo→
East Africa
🇰🇪Kenya→🇹🇿Tanzania→🇺🇬Uganda→🇷🇼Rwanda→🇪🇹Ethiopia→🇧🇮Burundi→🇩🇯Djibouti→🇪🇷Eritrea→🇰🇲Comoros→🇲🇬Madagascar→🇲🇺Mauritius→🇲🇼Malawi→🇸🇨Seychelles→🇸🇴Somalia→🇸🇸South Sudan→
Central Africa
🇨🇲Cameroon→🇦🇴Angola→🇨🇩DR Congo→🇨🇬Congo-Brazzaville→🇨🇫Central African Republic→🇹🇩Chad→🇬🇦Gabon→🇬🇶Equatorial Guinea→🇸🇹São Tomé and Príncipe→
Southern Africa
🇿🇦South Africa→🇧🇼Botswana→🇳🇦Namibia→🇿🇲Zambia→🇿🇼Zimbabwe→🇲🇿Mozambique→🇸🇿Eswatini→🇱🇸Lesotho→
North Africa
🇪🇬Egypt→🇲🇦Morocco→🇹🇳Tunisia→🇩🇿Algeria→🇱🇾Libya→🇸🇩Sudan→
Mandatory cover checklist

Check third-party motor cover before road use

Not sure how to get the most from the Motor Third-Party Premium? Enter your amounts, rates and dates and it returns a clear estimate with the assumptions shown — built for all 54 African countries.

  • What you get: a clear estimate with the assumptions shown, so you can move from a quick look to a real decision.
  • How it works: the Motor Third-Party Premium takes your amounts, rates and dates and shows the working, not just a single number.
  • What to check: confirm current prices, fees and official rates for your country before you rely on the result. It is a planning estimate, not financial advice.

Reviewed 2026. Results are a guide — always confirm current prices, fees and official rates for your country before acting. It is a planning estimate, not financial advice.

Result: choose vehicle type to prepare a third-party insurance checklist.

Frequently Asked Questions

How do I use the Motor Third-Party Premium?

Enter your amounts, rates and dates in the fields above. The Motor Third-Party Premium then gives you a clear estimate with the assumptions shown you can use straight away.

How accurate is the Motor Third-Party Premium?

It is as accurate as the values you enter and shows the assumptions behind the result. Always confirm current prices, fees and official rates for your country before you rely on it. It is a planning estimate, not financial advice.

Is the Motor Third-Party Premium free, and does it cover my country?

Yes — it is completely free, works on any phone or computer with no signup, and is built for all 54 African countries.
